title: Press On Down the Wilderness Road
description: The city still argues through familiar voices. Answer Obstinate without pride, steady Pliable without flattery, and keep the little light ahead until the ground begins to fail.
description_zh: 旧城仍借熟悉的声音争辩。回应固执而不骄傲，扶持易迁而不谄媚，并一直望着前方微光，直到地面开始下陷。

steps.description: Answer Obstinate, and let the burning city go.
steps.description_zh: 回应固执，并放下那座正在焚烧的城。

steps.description: Tell Pliable the truth about the road ahead.
steps.description_zh: 把前路的真相告诉易迁。

steps.description: At the brink of the lowland, fix your eyes on the light.
steps.description_zh: 站在低地边缘时，把眼睛定在光上。
